description: CodeCache M10.2 micro-suite: hand-verified gold-context fixture for offline Layer-1 retrieval-quality scoring. This is a PROXY for the real ContextBench corpus (arXiv:2602.05892) — it uses the same scoring protocol (Recall@k, Precision@k, F1 at file and block(function) granularity) but with small synthetic-but-realistic corpora and hand-labeled gold answers. R2 swaps in the real ContextBench corpus using the identical scorer. Queries and gold labels are hand-verified: the gold (file, symbol) blocks are the functions/classes that a correct implementation would need to read to answer the query.

scoring_protocol.note: File-level: did retrieved set include the gold file(s)? Block-level: did it include the gold (file, symbol_name) pair? A retrieved result is a hit if its file_path (file-level) or (file_path, symbol_name) (block-level) is in the gold set.

corpora.description: Authentication and authorization module (Python-style). Tests keyword-rich queries where BM25 should perform well.

queries.note: Direct keyword match; BM25 expected to find authenticate_user easily.
Session token generation; both generate_session_token and authenticate_user are gold (latter calls former).
Permission check; gold is check_permission and get_user_roles.
Token validation and expiry; gold is validate_token.
SEMANTIC query — BM25 may miss this since none of the functions use the exact phrase 'error handling'. Expected BM25 recall gap (informational, D1).

corpora.description: Configuration loading and validation module (TypeScript-style). Tests queries on config/settings domain.

queries.note: Config loading from disk; gold is loadConfig.
Config validation; gold is validateConfig (throws on missing fields).
Default config and merge; gold is mergeWithDefaults and getDefaultConfig.
Env var overrides; gold is loadEnvOverrides.
SEMANTIC query about missing settings — BM25 may miss since exact phrase does not appear. Expected BM25 recall gap (informational, D1).

corpora.description: Data transformation and pipeline module (Go-style). Tests queries on stream processing, filtering, aggregation.

queries.note: Aggregation; gold is AggregateSum and AggregateCount.
Pipeline execution; gold is RunPipeline and Stage.
